name: @workspace/ipfs-storage
description: Shared IPFS storage library for workspace projects

scripts.build: npm run check && npm run test
scripts.check: node --check src/index.js && node --check src/client.js && node --check src/config.js && node --check src/gateway.js && node --check src/files.js && node --check src/artifacts.js && node --check src/api-proxy.js && node --check scripts/check-node.mjs && node --check scripts/export-recovery-artifacts.mjs && node --check scripts/publish-path.mjs && node --check scripts/publish-skillmesh-definition.mjs && node --check src/skillmesh.js && node --check scripts/release-installer.mjs && node --check scripts/validate-release.mjs && node --check scripts/verify-release-download.mjs && node --check scripts/preflight-node.mjs && node --check scripts/setup-node.mjs && node --check scripts/wait-for-node.mjs && node --check scripts/smoke-bittrees.mjs && node --check scripts/start-ipfs-api-proxy.mjs && node --check scripts/run-host-supervisor.mjs
